posts.community: Everest Kanto Cylinders Ltd. - A long runway ahead!
posts.text: bseindia.com ca6066b4-12f8-450f-957a-e13bfc58b1d5.pdf another example of Corporate governance standards at EKC. they have appointed CEO and not complied to Regulation 30.. how have they appointed without having credentials of the person.. actually the company doesnt care much about governance and minority shareholders… bseindia.com cbcf91ac-2df6-4b64-8079-5e9320f910a9.pdf Results also not great. sales down.. Q4 profits are up due to some tax write backs. It will take this company 10 years to come back to peak performance of FY 2022. that too is doubtful. Most importantly we need to know status…
